titleStmt.title: SII 10.255: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 255. (A.R. No. 303 of 1924.) ON A PILLAR IN THE KALYĀṆA-MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF MUKTĪŚVARA AT MUKTYĀLA, NANDIGAMA TALUK, KRISHNA DISTRICT. Date lost.

summary.p: Incomplete. Gives the geneology of Īvani-Kaṇḍravāṭi Kēśavarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lakṣmīśanābhihēmābjā dvāṇīvibhu ra
jāyata . tasya pādasarōjātā tpaṁḍabhū
mīśvarō jani . tasyāsvayē bhava dasau bhuvi kaṁṭa
bhūpa stīvrāsikṛttabalavatkaḍiyābha
vīraḥ . nellūrisiddhinṛpabhīṣaṇakuṁ
bhikuṁbha prōnmuktamauktikavirā
jitavīrabhūmiḥ . tasmā dabhū
tkēśavadhāruṇīśa stārādritārā
gaṇacārukī¨rttiḥ . prītyā vahā
ṁ nadanṛpālaputrīṁ bimmāṁbi
kāṁ haṁnasamānayānāṁ .
tābhyā mabhū dgōṁkadharādhinā
dha ssauṁda¨ryyaśau¨ryyōjvalara
tnahāraḥ . kṛṣṇābthijābhyā miva śaṁ
barāri rudrādrijābhyā miva tā
rakāriḥ . padmēva viṣṇō ¨rggiri jēva
śaṁbbhō ssī tēva rāmasya śacīva ji
ṣṇōḥ . vippaṟtipōtakṣitipālapu
trī mēḍāṁbi kāsī dbhuvi tasya patnī .
tābhyāṁ sūnu rajāya tāyata
bhujaśrīkēśavō¨rvvīśvarō dhīmā nī
vanikaṁḍravāṭiviṣayakṣīrābthila
kṣmīdhavaḥ . bāhāsipravidāritārima
davatkuṁbhīṁdrakuṁbhasthalōnmuktavyakta
saraktamauktikamaṇibhrājiṣṇughōrāvahaḥ (incomplete)
Digital edition of SII 10.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
